title: Using dashboard for sum total of column of view
excerpt:
is there a way to use dashboard to give me a sum of a column in a VIEW? it seems it can easily show me sum of a column of the board but not a view of the board 
that make sense?

posts.author: dreborn (Jordan Friedman)
posts.cookedHtml:
is there a way to use dashboard to give me a sum of a column in a VIEW? it seems it can easily show me sum of a column of the board but not a view of the board

that make sense?

posts.author: dreborn (Jordan Friedman)
posts.cookedHtml: i figured it out–didn’t know you could filter a widget and it wouldn’t affect your board

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @dreborn, great! Did you end up using the table widget to achieve this?
